name: Sequential Filter Family Skeleton
summary: Carry a running state estimate forward, compare it with each new observation, assimilate the evidence, and emit the updated posterior state.
dejargonized_summary: Keep a best guess of the hidden state, revise that guess when new measurements arrive, and keep the uncertainty attached instead of dropping it.

stages.name: Predict State Hypothesis
stages.description: Advance the prior state estimate through the transition dynamics before the next observation is processed.
stages.dejargonized_description: Project the current guess one step forward before looking at the next measurement.
preconditions: A prior state estimate and transition rule are available.
guarantees: Produces a forward-propagated state hypothesis without consuming the new observation.

stages.name: Predict Uncertainty
stages.description: Advance the uncertainty representation that accompanies the predicted state.
stages.dejargonized_description: Carry forward how unsure the filter is, not just the state guess itself.
preconditions: The filter carries an explicit uncertainty representation.
guarantees: Preserves the uncertainty channel needed for measurement assimilation.

stages.name: Score Measurement Fit
stages.description: Evaluate how well the new observation agrees with the predicted state and uncertainty without mutating the belief directly.
stages.dejargonized_description: Check how surprising the new measurement is before changing the running estimate.
preconditions: Prediction outputs still retain the uncertainty needed to evaluate fit.
guarantees: Produces evidence terms that can drive the update step while keeping scoring stateless.

stages.name: Assimilate Observation
stages.description: Combine the prediction and measurement evidence to produce the posterior state and posterior uncertainty.
stages.dejargonized_description: Use the new measurement to revise the guess and its confidence together.
preconditions: Prediction and measurement evidence refer to the same observation step.
guarantees: Produces a posterior belief state ready for the next sequential iteration.

stages.name: Emit Posterior Estimate
stages.description: Package the posterior state and uncertainty into the external estimate emitted for this step.
stages.dejargonized_description: Return the updated guess in a form the rest of the pipeline can consume.
preconditions: The posterior state and uncertainty have both been updated.
guarantees: Emits a step-local output while preserving the uncertainty channel.

edges.provenance: Forward-propagated uncertainty channel for the current step.
edges.alignment_expectation: uncertainty remains paired with the predicted state

edges.provenance: State prediction handed to the update step.
edges.alignment_expectation: state prediction remains tied to the current observation step

edges.provenance: Prediction uncertainty handed to the update step.
edges.alignment_expectation: uncertainty channel stays aligned with the predicted state

edges.provenance: Evidence derived from the current observation only.
edges.alignment_expectation: measurement evidence remains scoped to the same time step

edges.provenance: Posterior state after assimilating the current observation.
edges.alignment_expectation: posterior state stays paired with its posterior uncertainty

edges.provenance: Posterior uncertainty after assimilating the current observation.
edges.alignment_expectation: posterior uncertainty stays paired with its posterior state

planning_constraints.subject: sequential_filter
planning_constraints.statement: Keep state prediction and uncertainty propagation explicit until the observation-assimilation stage completes.
planning_constraints.rationale: Sequential filters rely on advancing both the estimate and its uncertainty before the measurement update.

planning_constraints.subject: measurement_evidence
planning_constraints.statement: Treat measurement scoring as an evidence-producing step rather than a belief-mutating shortcut.
planning_constraints.rationale: This keeps variant-specific likelihood logic isolated while preserving the shared family structure.

planning_constraints.subject: uncertainty_representation
planning_constraints.statement: Do not discard the uncertainty representation before the posterior estimate is emitted.
planning_constraints.rationale: Both Kalman-style and particle-style variants depend on uncertainty surviving through the update boundary.

audit.rationale: Provides the Phase 1 matcher-local compatibility asset for the sequential_filter pilot while canonical family ownership remains outside this repository.

migration_readiness.rationale: The pilot family scaffold is explicit and loadable, but family-level ownership and broader variant coverage are still being migrated.

checklist.description: Stage contracts and edge semantics are explicit and loadable as a first-class skeleton asset.
evidence: The asset declares typed stages, typed edges, and audit metadata required by the loader.

checklist.description: The pilot captures kalman_filter and particle_filter as family variant hints.
evidence: The asset-backed registry exposes kalman_filter and particle_filter through variant_hints.

checklist.description: The scaffold remains family-generic rather than encoding a single concrete topology.
notes: Variant-specific sub-topologies still live in matcher code during the pilot and are not fully reconciled into one shared external scaffold.

provenance_notes: Transitional matcher-local asset used to prove asset-backed sequential_filter loading without changing namespace or discovery behavior.
uncertainty_notes: Variant-specific resampling, gain computation, and richer posterior branches remain outside this family-level pilot scaffold.
